title: Hymenophyllum meyenianum
taxonomy: Hymenophyllum meyenianum is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the filmy ferns. This family is part of the larger group of vascular plants known as the Polypodiophyta. Hymenophyllum meyenianum is specifically classified within the genus Hymenophyllum, a group of small to medium-sized ferns. The species is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, where it is commonly found in humid and shaded environments. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics, such as its delicate fronds and epiphytic growth habit.
